[86:34]aligned against white people and that black people and minorities have received preferential

[86:45]on golf and a bit of foreign policy.

[86:54]a guest and a nod to the American president's favorite sport.

[87:02]Trump to change his mind and see there was no genocide in South Africa.

[87:10]of South Africans. Mr. Trump was ready with his response. He said, turn the lights down and put

[87:16]this on. A booming video mashup began to play, including footage of people calling for violence

[87:23]against white farmers in South Africa by the end.
